headline: TD Cowen Downgrades Bio-Techne to Hold, Raises Price Target to $73
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Kyle Boucher   downgrades Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) from Buy to Hold and raises the price target from $65 to $73.
